bundles.title: Define canonical surface event TypeScript types
bundles.goal: Create src/contracts/surface-events.ts with actor/surface identity types and the full SurfaceEventEnvelope discriminated union.

tasks.title: Define ActorKind string literal union and ActorIdentity interface (D2)
Define SurfaceKind string literal union and SurfaceIdentity interface (D2)
Define EventDirection ('inbound' | 'outbound') string literal union (D4)
Define EventKind and EventType string literal unions for the discriminant fields (D4)
Define CorrelationContext interface with optional sequence field (D7)
Define SurfaceEventEnvelope interface with schema_version '1.0', all required fields, and readonly modifiers (D1, D6)
Define concrete event type interfaces as discriminated union members of SurfaceEventEnvelope
Export all public types from the module
Verify the module compiles with tsc and passes lint

bundles.title: Create JSON Schema files for surface events
bundles.goal: Author JSON Schema files under assets/global/schemas/surface-events/ that mirror each concrete event type for language-agnostic consumers.

tasks.title: Create assets/global/schemas/surface-events/ directory
Author envelope.schema.json defining the base SurfaceEventEnvelope with schema_version, discriminant fields, and correlation
Author individual .schema.json files for each concrete event type (one per event_type discriminant)
Author actor-identity.schema.json and surface-identity.schema.json for the identity sub-objects
Validate all schema files parse as valid JSON Schema draft-2020-12

bundles.title: Wire schema distribution via install contract
bundles.goal: Add an InstallCopyContract entry in src/contracts/install.ts so the distribution bundle copies global/schemas/ to the user config directory.

tasks.title: Add InstallCopyContract entry for global/schemas → $HOME/.config/specflow/global/schemas in installCopies array
Verify the contracts bundle exports the updated installCopies and compiles cleanly

bundles.title: Replace phase-router placeholder SurfaceEvent with canonical import
bundles.goal: Remove the placeholder SurfaceEvent and SurfaceEventSink from phase-router/types.ts and replace with imports from the canonical contract module.

tasks.title: Import SurfaceEventEnvelope from src/contracts/surface-events.ts into phase-router/types.ts
Remove the placeholder SurfaceEvent interface and replace the type alias with re-export from canonical module
Update SurfaceEventSink to accept SurfaceEventEnvelope (or re-export canonical SurfaceEventSink if defined)
Update phase-router emit call sites to construct full SurfaceEventEnvelope with actor, surface, and correlation fields from orchestrator context (D5)
Update existing phase-router test fixtures to use the expanded envelope shape
Run phase-router unit tests and verify all pass

bundles.title: Add build-time test for TypeScript/JSON Schema consistency
bundles.goal: Create a test that parses JSON Schema files and validates them against sample TypeScript objects to detect drift between the two representations.

tasks.title: Create test file that loads each JSON Schema from assets/global/schemas/surface-events/
Construct sample SurfaceEventEnvelope objects (one per concrete event type) using the TypeScript types
Validate each sample object against its corresponding JSON Schema using a schema validator (e.g., ajv)
Add negative test cases: objects with missing required fields must fail validation
Verify test passes in CI (build + test)
